description:
100% Open Source Toolkit for Large Language Models: Train, Tune, Chat on your own Machine

Transformer Lab is a free, open-source LLM workspace that you can run on your own computer. It is designed to go beyond what most modern open LLM applications allow. Using Transformer Lab you can easily finetune, evaluate, export and test LLMs across different inference engines and platforms.
What's Changed
- Fix native element in audio player by @deep1401 in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/748
- Fix no training plugins message and some typos by @deep1401 in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/757
- Add/audio cloning by @mina-parham in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/746
- Add/adaptor name audio by @mina-parham in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/761
- Add text-to-audio as an Audio pipelineTag by @dadmobile in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/765
- Add adaptor name in audioplayer by @mina-parham in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/762
- Fix/disable audio cloning mlx by @mina-parham in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/766
- Add/voice audio by @mina-parham in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/749
- Fix Tool Calling by @aahaanmaini in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/736
Full Changelog: https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/compare/v0.22.0...v0.23.0
